# You are viewing `.github/`

GitHub shows a **folder-specific README**. The **main project overview**, quick start, tech stack, and contributor workflow are in the **repository root**:

**[README.md (canonical) →](https://github.com/choices-project/choices/blob/main/README.md)** · **[Repository home →](https://github.com/choices-project/choices)**

---

**Choices** is a privacy-first participatory democracy platform (Next.js 14, Supabase, Vercel). For setup, architecture, security, and the full documentation index, use the links above or browse [`docs/`](../docs/) locally.

---

## What lives in this directory

| Item | Purpose |
|------|--------|
| [`workflows/`](./workflows/) | CI, security scanning, deploy, and scheduled jobs |
| [`ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`](./ISSUE_TEMPLATE/) | Bug, feature, and documentation issue forms |
| [`PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`](./PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md) | PR checklist for contributors |
| [`SUPPORT.md`](./SUPPORT.md) | Support expectations |
| [`dependabot.yml`](./dependabot.yml), [`labeler.yml`](./labeler.yml), etc. | Automation configuration |

Historical notes on branch protection and workflow audits: [`docs/archive/2026-03-consolidation/github/`](../docs/archive/2026-03-consolidation/github/).

---

**Local clones:** from this folder, the root README is at [`../README.md`](../README.md) and the doc index is at [`../docs/README.md`](../docs/README.md).
